cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. The question is asking what Lao Yang hoped for. The options are A to D. Let me read through the story again to make sure I understand the context. So, Lao Yang was born in a small town and into reading when he was in school. He thought writers were respected and could make a lot of money. He wrote lots of stories and sent them to editorial departments but never got any responses. Now he works in a factory, busy with work. When he's free, he reads. He always remembers wanting to be a writer when he was young. His daughter Xiao Ping comes home worried because her Chinese teacher, Miss Gao, assigned an article titled "My Father" that they need to write. She doesn't know what to write. Lao Yang says it's easy and helps her by writing the article himself. He finishes it on time and is sure Miss Gao would like it. Later, he asks his daughter if the article was chosen to be sent to the editorial department. The daughter says the teacher said
